title: Correct: envelope test uses unsplit single SMTP address
description: WHY THIS IS CORRECT: eval_envelope_test calls address_part(raw_addr, args.part) directly on ctx.envelope_from / ctx.envelope_to without calling split_addresses. RFC 5228 §5.3 specifies that the envelope parts 'from' and 'to' are individual SMTP envelope addresses (MAIL FROM and RCPT TO), not header field values that can contain multiple comma-separated addresses. No splitting is required or appropriate. For unknown part names the function correctly skips them (continue), returning false per RFC 5228 §5.3 semantics.
